author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Impact Summit - Schedule

Hey everyone, a reminder about Impact, our full-day free event happening at Breakpoint on September 21! Here's what you can expect 

 Keynote by CEO Michael Wagner
 Exciting team members presentations, panels and chats
 Surge tournament on our new Multiplayer map
 Sneak peeks
 Guild and IP presentations and booths

Can't make it in person? No worries, we'll be streaming the event on our YouTube channel!  

If you want to coordinate activities with the community, check out this channel: ⁠No Access

 | Register: https://lu.ma/3728vl8l
